hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) dir="$f"; while [ "$dir" != "/" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); [ -f "$dir/eslint.config.js" ] && break; done; [ -f "$dir/eslint.config.js" ] && (cd "$dir" && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$f");; esac; pnpm exec prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
